_comment: DEPRECATED (2026-04-17, WP-2.2). This layout predates the visual pane and is kept for reference only. The active layouts going forward are `solo` (chat + visual) and `studio` (main chat + visual + sidebar chat). A three-panel variant that surfaces a vault-notes column may be reintroduced later as a compound layout that also hosts the visual pane; this file documents the prior shape but is not loadable from the active switcher.
